_comment: CANARY — a deliberately BAD read of the same drawing. The eval MUST fail this. Two classic real failure modes combined: (1) the inch->mm trap — units misread as 'in' when the title block says mm; (2) dropped callouts — only 3 of 8 dimensions recovered and one hole group missed. If a future change to the scorer ever lets this PASS, the eval has lost its teeth. Kept alongside the good fixture so the test brackets the bar from both sides.
_backend_detail: deliberately-bad canary: inch misread + dropped callouts
